nasb.text: and we ourselves heard this utterance made from heaven when we were with Him on the holy mountain.

esv.text: we ourselves heard this very voice borne from heaven, for we were with him on the holy mountain.

cnv.text: 這從天上發出來的聲音，是我們和他同在聖山上的時候，親自聽見過的。

ccb.text: 当时我们和祂一同在圣山上，亲耳听见了这来自天上的声音。

csbs.text: 这从天上传来的声音，是我们与他一起在圣山上的时候听见的，
